MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-06-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Further settlement conference held. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff with counsel, Roger L. Meredith; defendants by counsel, Carol A. Atkinson. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathely. The case is settled as follows: Defendants to pay to plaintiff $11,000.00 in full satisfaction of all claims, including attorney fees and costs, in exchange for a dismissal by plaintiffs, with prejudice. The trial date herein is vacated.
